headline: 《龙族》领跑热搜，《痴迷》本周霸榜
headlineEn: Dragon Clan Leads Trends, Obsession Dominates Week
summary: 今日娱乐头条：《权力的游戏前传：龙族》持续火爆，本周《痴迷》成最大赢家。《奥德赛》等新片备受期待。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment: House of the Dragon remains hot, Obsession tops the week. Upcoming Odyssey and others highly anticipated.

industryHighlights.text: 今日无新片上映，本周仅2部新片
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, only 2 this week

industryHighlights.text: 《奥德赛》《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》即将上映
industryHighlights.en: Odyssey and Spider-Man: Fresh Day coming soon

industryHighlights.text: 《火遮眼》《鬼玩人：炼狱》跻身本周热搜
industryHighlights.en: Fire in Eyes and Evil Dead: Purgatory enter weekly top
